boundary_binding.action_boundary: May AP execute the requested payment, invoice release, or vendor-master action
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: No; current source control does not close duplicate review dependency
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Duplicate review dependency must be closed before execution
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: Open duplicate-review dependency blocks action execution

critical_features_preserved: duplicate review must be closed, not merely opened
final_answer: The action may not proceed. Source control records do not close the exact duplicate-review dependency, and policy requires current source records to close the boundary before payment, invoice release, or vendor-master execution. History, urgency, or credit memo mention do not override the unresolved source-control gap.
